Active Work Architecture
─[ Lore Docker Runtime Image ]─ ┐

Lore Docker Runtime Image

Goal

Create a standalone lore-docker runtime image that hosts MkDocs, semantic search, and maintenance watchers while mounting only instance docs/ content. Keep all derived artifacts out of instance repos.

Repo Scope

  • lorehq: plan tracking only
  • lore-docker: new runtime image repo (implementation)
  • agent-demo-with-lore: test instance migration and validation
  • lore: follow-up docs/skill updates after runtime proves stable

Work Items

  • Create lore-docker repo scaffold with runtime entrypoint, watcher, semantic API, nav generator
  • Bundle UI assets (logo/css/js) in image and stage into runtime docs workspace
  • Support docs-only mount (/data/docs) and derived volumes (/runtime-data, /runtime-cache)
  • Expose env settings for all tweakable runtime and semantic options
  • Add Docker Hub publishing files (README + publish workflow)
  • Migrate agent-demo-with-lore compose to consume lore-docker runtime image
  • Validate from clean state (no repo mkdocs/site/index artifacts) and verify UI + semantic behavior
  • Update lore docs/skill references for new runtime contract

Validation Criteria

  • Instance repo has no generated mkdocs.yml
  • Instance repo has no generated site/
  • Instance repo has no semantic DB/index artifacts
  • Docs UI serves with expected header tabs, logo, css, and js
  • Semantic API returns healthy and queryable results

Progress Notes

  • 2026-02-20: Plan created. Implementation started.
  • 2026-02-20: Created /home/andrew/Github/lore-docker with runtime container, watcher, semantic API, nav generator, and bundled UI assets.
  • 2026-02-20: Added Docker Hub publishing workflow (.github/workflows/publish.yml) and runtime/env documentation (README.md).
  • 2026-02-20: Migrated /home/andrew/Github/agent-demo-with-lore/docker-compose.yml to use lore-docker:dev image with docs-only mount and derived-data volumes.
  • 2026-02-20: Removed instance-local runtime/semantic tooling and repo-local UI assets from /home/andrew/Github/agent-demo-with-lore.
  • 2026-02-20: Validated clean-start behavior: no generated mkdocs.yml/site/semantic artifacts in instance repo; docs and semantic endpoints healthy.
  • 2026-02-20: Updated lore skill guidance in .lore/skills/lore-ui/SKILL.md and synced platform copies.
  • 2026-02-20: Cleanup pass — stripped Dockerfile, mkdocs.yml, requirements-docs.txt from lore source; rewrote docker-compose.yml to pull lorehq/lore-docker:latest; removed dead generate-agents.sh; rewrote lore-ui skill for published image lifecycle; added docsPort/semanticSearchUrl config fields; initial commit + v0.1.0 tag on lore-docker; deleted disposable agent-demo-with-lore scaffold.
PgUp/PgDn: scroll b: bulk commands q: quit x: menu ← → ↑ ↓: navigate
Donate 0.24.4
